fem. of the preceding; a booth in which garden-keepers lodge, Isa 1:8 also a suspended bed, hanging from lofty trees, in which wanderers and also the keepers of gardens and vineyards lodge for fear of wild beasts; Arabic and Aram. عِرْزَالُ עַרְזְלָא, see Buxtorfii Lex. Chald. h. v. and Niebuhr’s Description of Arabia, p. 158, Isa 24:20.
